# Allow-list of NuGet package ids permitted in the transitive dependency closure
# of the 5 packable projects (AC-H / NFR-LIC-1, PD-34).
#
# The `license-check` CI job (.github/workflows/ci.yml) runs
# `dotnet list <project> package --include-transitive --format json` for each
# packable project below and fails the build if the union of all returned
# package ids (top-level + transitive, all target frameworks) is not a subset
# of this file.
#
# Packable projects covered:
#   src/SkathIO.Rogue.Abstractions/SkathIO.Rogue.Abstractions.csproj
#   src/SkathIO.Rogue/SkathIO.Rogue.csproj
#   src/SkathIO.Rogue.MediatR/SkathIO.Rogue.MediatR.csproj
#   src/SkathIO.Rogue.Logging/SkathIO.Rogue.Logging.csproj
#   src/SkathIO.Rogue.Validation.FluentValidation/SkathIO.Rogue.Validation.FluentValidation.csproj
#
# Adding a new id to this file requires FIRST verifying that the package's
# license is permissive (MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-2-Clause, BSD-3-Clause, MS-PL,
# 0BSD, Unlicense, or the .NET-foundation/MICROSOFT family) — see
# docs/governance.md "Dependency policy" for the procedure. Annotate the new
# line with the format: # <id> — <SPDX/license> — verified <date>
#
# This gate checks identity, not license text; the license check happens here,
# at allow-list-edit time, by a human.
#
# One package id per line (lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored).

# FluentValidation — Apache-2.0 — verified 2026-06-12
FluentValidation
# Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces
# Microsoft.Build.Tasks.Git — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.Build.Tasks.Git
# Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.PublicApiAnalyzers — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.PublicApiAnalyzers
# Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Abstractions — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Abstractions
# Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions
# Microsoft.NET.ILLink.Tasks — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.NET.ILLink.Tasks
# Microsoft.NETCore.Platforms — Microsoft .NET Library License (proprietary EULA,
# dotnet_library_license.txt; content-free RID-graph metadata package, build-time-only —
# not present in any of the 5 packable projects' shipped .nuspec dependency lists) —
# accepted, verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.NETCore.Platforms
# Microsoft.SourceLink.Common — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.SourceLink.Common
# Microsoft.SourceLink.GitHub — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
Microsoft.SourceLink.GitHub
# MinVer — Apache-2.0 — verified 2026-06-12
MinVer
# NETStandard.Library — MIT (.NET Foundation and Contributors, dotnet/standard LICENSE.TXT) — verified 2026-06-12
NETStandard.Library
# System.Buffers — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
System.Buffers
# System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource
# System.Memory — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
System.Memory
# System.Numerics.Vectors — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
System.Numerics.Vectors
# System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe
# System.Threading.Tasks.Extensions — MIT — verified 2026-06-12
System.Threading.Tasks.Extensions
